ns0:entry.ns0:title: AIDC-AI/Pixelle-Video
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AIDC-AI/Pixelle-Video
Language: python
🚀 AI 全自动短视频引擎 | AI Fully Automated Short Video Engine

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LearningCircuit/local-deep-research
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LearningCircuit/local-deep-research
Language: python
Local Deep Research achieves ~95% on SimpleQA benchmark (tested with Qwen 3.6). Supports local and cloud LLMs (Ollama, Google, Anthropic, ...). Searches 10+ sources - arXiv, PubMed, web, and your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Lightricks/LTX-2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Lightricks/LTX-2
Language: python
Official Python inference and LoRA trainer package for the LTX-2 audio–video generative model.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MervinPraison/PraisonAI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MervinPraison/PraisonAI
Language: python
PraisonAI 🦞 — Hire a 24/7 AI Workforce. Stop writing boilerplate and start shipping autonomous self-improving agents that research, plan, code, and execute tasks. Deployed in 5 lines of code with built-in memory, RAG, and support for 100+ LLMs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OWASP/Nettacker
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OWASP/Nettacker
Language: python
Automated Penetration Testing Framework - Open-Source Vulnerability Scanner - Vulnerability Management

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenBMB/VoxCPM
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenBMB/VoxCPM
Language: python
VoxCPM2: Tokenizer-Free TTS for Multilingual Speech Generation, Creative Voice Design, and True-to-Life Cloning

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Q00/ouroboros
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Q00/ouroboros
Language: python
Agent OS: Stop prompting. Start specifying.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TauricResearch/TradingAgents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ag2ai/ag2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ag2ai/ag2
Language: python
AG2 (formerly AutoGen): The Open-Source AgentOS.Join us at: https://discord.gg/sNGSwQME3x

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alexgreensh/token-optimizer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alexgreensh/token-optimizer
Language: python
Find the ghost tokens. Fix them. Survive compaction. Avoid context quality decay.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cocoindex-io/cocoindex
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cocoindex-io/cocoindex
Language: python
Incremental engine for long horizon agents 🌟 Star if you like it!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: raullenchai/Rapid-MLX
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/raullenchai/Rapid-MLX
Language: python
The fastest local AI engine for Apple Silicon. 4.2x faster than Ollama, 0.08s cached TTFT, 100% tool calling. 17 tool parsers, prompt cache, reasoning separation, cloud routing. Drop-in OpenAI replacement. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Aider.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sansan0/TrendRadar
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sansan0/TrendRadar
Language: python
⭐AI-driven public opinion & trend monitor with multi-platform aggregation, RSS, and smart alerts.🎯 告别信息过载，你的 AI 舆情监控助手与热点筛选工具！聚合多平台热点 + RSS 订阅，支持关键词精准筛选。AI 智能筛选新闻 + AI 翻译 + AI 分析简报直推手机，也支持接入 MCP 架构，赋能 AI 自然语言对话分析、情感洞察与趋势预测等。支持 Docker ，数据本地/云端自持。集成微信/飞书/钉钉/Telegram/邮件/ntfy/bark/slack 等渠道智能推送。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: soxoj/maigret
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/soxoj/maigret
Language: python
🕵️‍♂️ Collect a dossier on a person by username from 3000+ sites
